commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Breadth. The tribe of Gad, slew or drove the Agarites from their neighbourhood, and seized their country, 1 Paralipomenon v. 18, 22. Hebrew, Septuagint, and Chaldean, "Blessed be he that enlargeth Gad "which was verified in Jephte, Josue xi. 33. (Calmet)
